ground_truth_text: EMPLOYMENT CONTRACT AGREEMENT This contract is signed between TechSolutions Pvt Ltd, Bangalore, and Jane Smith, residing at Pune, Maharashtra. Salary packages: INR 15,00,000 per annum. Bank Account details: HDFC Bank A/c 501001234567, IFSC HDFC0000123. The employee shall start on 2026-07-15 as Senior Developer.
